metadata.description: Rig humanoid 3D models from GLB URLs with Meshy, returning rigged GLB/FBX files plus basic   animations.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/meshy/rigging
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/meshy/rigging queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Auto-rig and optionally animate any 3D humanoid model (GLB format).

Accepts any publicly accessible GLB URL — works with models generated
by Hunyuan, Trellis, Meshy, or any other 3D generation tool.

Features:
- Automatic humanoid rigging with skeleton
- Basic walking and running animations included
- Optional animation presets from Meshy's 500+ preset library
- Output in both GLB and FBX formats
- Processing time: 1-3 minutes

MeshyRiggingInput.title: RiggingInput
MeshyRiggingInput.description: Input for standalone auto-rigging and animation of a 3D model

height_meters.title: Height Meters
height_meters.description: Approximate height of the character in meters.

enable_animation.title: Enable Animation
enable_animation.description: Apply an animation preset to the rigged model.

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.

model_url.title: Model Url
model_url.description: URL of a 3D model in GLB format to rig. Can be any publicly accessible URL — works with models generated by Hunyuan, Trellis, Meshy, or any other 3D generation tool. The model must be a humanoid character with clearly defined limbs.

animation_action_id.title: Animation Action Id
animation_action_id.description: Animation preset ID from Meshy's library. Only used when enable_animation is true; in that case it must be in [0, 696] (``0`` is the "Idle" preset) and is otherwise rejected with a 422. See https://docs.meshy.ai/en/api/animation-library for available action IDs.

MeshyRiggingOutput.title: RiggingOutput
MeshyRiggingOutput.description: Output for standalone auto-rigging and animation

animation_glb.description: Animated 3D model in GLB format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

animation_fbx.description: Animated 3D model in FBX format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

basic_animations.description: Basic walking and running animations included with rigging.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

BasicAnimations.title: BasicAnimations
BasicAnimations.description: Basic animation files included with the rigging result

walking_armature_glb.description: Walking armature only in GLB format

running_armature_glb.description: Running armature only in GLB format

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Meshy-5 retexture applies new, high-quality textures to existing 3D models using either text prompts or reference images. It supports PBR material generation for realistic, production-ready results.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/meshy/v5/retexture
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/meshy/v5/retexture queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Retexture a 3D model using Meshy-5.

Retexturing features:
- Apply texture styles to existing 3D models
- Supports text-based and image-based style guidance
- Best for enhancing existing models with new textures
- Processing time: 3-5 minutes

enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr
enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR Maps (metallic, roughness, normal) in addition to base color.

image_style_url.title: Image Style Url
image_style_url.description: 2D image to guide the texturing process. Supports .jpg, .jpeg, and .png formats. Required if text_style_prompt is not provided. If both are provided, image_style_url takes precedence.

enable_original_uv.title: Enable Original Uv
enable_original_uv.description: Use the original UV mapping of the model instead of generating new UVs. If the model has no original UV, output quality may be reduced.

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.

text_style_prompt.title: Text Style Prompt
text_style_prompt.description: Describe your desired texture style using text. Maximum 600 characters. Required if image_style_url is not provided.

model_url.title: Model Url
model_url.description: URL or base64 data URI of a 3D model to texture. Supports .glb, .gltf, .obj, .fbx, .stl formats. Can be a publicly accessible URL or data URI with MIME type application/octet-stream.

image_style_url.title: Image Style Url
image_style_url.description: The image URL used for texturing (if provided)

text_style_prompt.title: Text Style Prompt
text_style_prompt.description: The text prompt used for texturing (if provided)

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail of the retextured model

TextureFiles.title: TextureFiles
TextureFiles.description: Texture files downloaded and uploaded to CDN

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Meshy-5 remesh allows you to remesh and export existing 3D models into various formats

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/meshy/v5/remesh
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/meshy/v5/remesh queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Remesh a 3D model using Meshy-5.

Remeshing features:
- Simplify or refine the geometry of a 3D model
- Supports multiple output formats (GLB, FBX, OBJ, USDZ, STL)
- Can resize and reposition the model
- Processing time: 3-5 minutes

target_formats.title: Target Formats
target_formats.description: List of target formats for the remeshed model.

resize_height.title: Resize Height
resize_height.description: Resize the model to a certain height measured in meters. Set to 0 for no resizing.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Specify the topology of the generated model. Quad for smooth surfaces, Triangle for detailed geometry.

origin_at.title: Origin At
origin_at.description: Position of the origin. None means no effect.

model_url.title: Model Url
model_url.description: URL or base64 data URI of a 3D model to remesh. Supports .glb, .gltf, .obj, .fbx, .stl formats. Can be a publicly accessible URL or data URI with MIME type application/octet-stream.

target_polycount.title: Target Polycount
target_polycount.description: Target number of polygons in the generated model. Actual count may vary based on geometry complexity.

model_glb.description: Remeshed 3D object in GLB format (if GLB was requested).

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Optimize 3D mesh topology with Hunyuan 3D Smart Topology.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/smart-topology
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/smart-topology queue.

face_level.description: Target polygon density. high: more detail/polygons, medium: balanced, low: fewer polygons.
face_level.title: Face Level

input_file_url.title: Input File Url
input_file_url.description: URL of GLB or OBJ file to optimize topology. Max size: 200MB.

polygon_type.description: Output polygon type. triangle: triangular faces only. quadrilateral: mixed quad and triangle faces.
polygon_type.title: Polygon Type

model_glb.description: Processed 3D model with optimized topology (primary file).

mtl.description: MTL material file for OBJ model

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.
url.title: Url

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.

metadata.description: Split 3D models into parts with Hunyuan 3D

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/part
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/hunyuan-3d/v3.1/part queue.

input_file_url.description: URL of FBX file to split into parts. ONLY FBX format supported. Max size: 100MB, face count ≤30,000. Recommended: AIGC-generated models.
input_file_url.title: Input File Url

result_files.description: List of generated part files in FBX format
result_files.title: Result Files

metadata.description: SAM 3D enables full scene reconstructions, placing objects and humans in a shared context together.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/sam-3/3d-align
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/sam-3/3d-align queue.

x-fal-metadata.about: Align a SAM-3D Body mesh to MoGe/SAM-3D Objects coordinate frame for scene composition.

body_mesh_url.title: Body Mesh Url
body_mesh_url.description: URL of the SAM-3D Body mesh file (.ply or .glb) to align

object_mesh_url.title: Object Mesh Url
object_mesh_url.description: Optional URL of SAM-3D Object mesh (.glb) to create combined scene

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: URL of the original image used for MoGe depth estimation

body_mask_url.title: Body Mask Url
body_mask_url.description: URL of the human mask image. If not provided, uses full image.

focal_length.title: Focal Length
focal_length.description: Focal length from SAM-3D Body metadata. If not provided, estimated from MoGe.

scene_glb.description: Combined scene with body + object meshes in GLB format (only when object_mesh_url provided)

body_mesh_ply.description: Aligned body mesh in PLY format

model_glb.description: Aligned body mesh in GLB format (for 3D preview)

visualization.description: Visualization of aligned mesh overlaid on input image

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: The mime type of the file.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

file_size.title: File Size
file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: The name of the file. It will be auto-generated if not provided.

target_points_count.title: Target Points Count
target_points_count.description: Number of target points for alignment

schema.description: Whether to include logs (`1`) in the response or not (`0`).

success.description: Whether the request was cancelled successfully.
